zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Thornton於1454年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾 易亞斯特 利丁武特 牛頓時，他的父親William Thornton29歲，母親Agnes Aldborough24歲。他於1479年與Jane Layton在英國越可爾牛頓結婚。他們至少是11個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1514年在他的家鄉享年60歲，埋葬在美國喬治亞包爾丁奧瑟。

nameMeanings.name: Thornton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name from any of numerous places throughout England and Scotland so called, from Old English thorn ‘thorn tree’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. The placename is most frequent in northern England, especially Yorkshire, where there are at least 16 possible sources for the surname.
Irish: Anglicized (translated) form of Gaelic Mac Sceacháin ‘son of Sceachán’ (see Skehan ).
Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Draighneáin ‘descendant of Draighneán’ (see Drennan ).

variants.name: Thornber
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the five minor places in Yorkshire called Thornber, particularly Thornber in Halton West. The placenames derive from Old English thorn ‘thorn’ + beorg ‘hill, mound’.
Irish: adopted for various Irish names containing an element meaning ‘thorn’; compare   Thornton  .

variants.name: Thorton
meanings: English: probably a shortened form of   Thornton  , or a habitational name from Thorton in Marnhull, Dorset, which has the same origin.

variants.name: Skehan
meanings: Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Sceacháin or Ó Sceacháin ‘son (or descendant) of Sceachán’, a personal name probably based on a diminutive of sceach ‘briar, thorn bush’. The Gaelic name has sometimes been ‘translated’ as Thornton .

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Thornton was born in 1454, in Out Newton, Yorkshire East Riding, England, United Kingdom, his father, William Thornton, was 29 and his mother, Agnes Aldborough, was 24. He married Jane Layton in 1479, in Newton, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 11 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1514, in his hometown, at the age of 60, and was buried in Other, Paulding, Georgia, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Thornton est né en 1454, à Out Newton, Yorkshire East Riding, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Thornton, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Agnes Aldborough, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Jane Layton en 1479, à Newton, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 11 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1514, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 60 ans, et a été enterré à Other, Paulding, Géorgie, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert Thornton 1454 in Out Newton, Yorkshire East Riding, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Thornton 29 und seine Mutter Agnes Aldborough 24. Er hat 1479 in Newton, Yorkshire, England Jane Layton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 11 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1514 im Alter von 60 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Other, Paulding, Georgia, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

ko.East Newton, East Riding of Yorkshire, E: 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 이스트 리딩 우트 뉴턴
ko.lifeSummary: Robert Thornton(이)가 1454년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 이스트 리딩 우트 뉴턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Thornton(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Aldborough(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1479년 영국 요르크실르 뉴턴에서 Jane Layton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명 이상의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1514년 그의 고향에서 60세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 조지아 주 폴딩 터에 묻혔다.

ru.East Newton, East Riding of Yorkshire, E: оут нютон, еркшир эаст ридинг, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Thornton родился в 1454 г. в местности оут нютон, еркшир эаст ридинг, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William Thornton было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Aldborough, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Jane Layton в 1479 г. в местности нютон, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 11 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1514 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 60 лет и был похоронен в местности отир, поулдинг, Джорджия, Соединенные штаты.
